summary.overview: protected_production planning is ready for playbook.workflow-pack.reuse.v1 with deterministic, commandless implementation steps and preserved governance boundaries.

implementationSteps.title: Validate verification gate evidence requirements
implementationSteps.description: Confirm protected_production preserves local_and_promotion_required verification and retains the required evidence refs before any publish or deployment work advances.

implementationSteps.title: Carry approval policy into consumer review boundaries
implementationSteps.description: Document protected_environment approval expectations for protected_production with 1 required approval slot(s) and stable approver roles.

implementationSteps.title: Map provider-neutral secret refs without materializing values
implementationSteps.description: Carry only provider-neutral secret refs into downstream configuration for playbook.workflow-pack.reuse.v1; raw secret values remain blocked.

implementationSteps.title: Preserve receipt refs for verification and downstream handoff
implementationSteps.description: Keep the declared receipt refs available as downstream evidence and preserve them as the canonical receipt boundary.

implementationSteps.title: Document publish posture from the bridge report
implementationSteps.description: Keep publish_after_verification as a documented planning boundary so publish posture remains visible in the plan instead of being hidden in implementation details.

implementationSteps.title: Document deployment posture from the bridge report
implementationSteps.description: Treat receipt_only as a planning posture only and keep deployment boundaries explicit without generating execution artifacts.

implementationSteps.title: Review consumer rule 1
implementationSteps.description: Treat environment gates as approval and publish boundaries, not as verification truth.

implementationSteps.title: Review consumer rule 2
implementationSteps.description: Reference secrets through provider-neutral refs instead of embedding raw values.

implementationSteps.title: Review consumer rule 3
implementationSteps.description: Keep downstream projections read-only and preserve refs back to owner receipts.

consumerRuleActions.rule: Treat environment gates as approval and publish boundaries, not as verification truth.
consumerRuleActions.action: Review and carry consumer rule 1 into downstream implementation guidance without generating execution artifacts.

consumerRuleActions.rule: Reference secrets through provider-neutral refs instead of embedding raw values.
consumerRuleActions.action: Review and carry consumer rule 2 into downstream implementation guidance without generating execution artifacts.

consumerRuleActions.rule: Keep downstream projections read-only and preserve refs back to owner receipts.
consumerRuleActions.action: Review and carry consumer rule 3 into downstream implementation guidance without generating execution artifacts.
